About Aaryan Patel

# About Me I am a hardworking and passionate individual with a deep interest in the intersection of mathematics and technology. Currently, I am focused on transitioning my hobby of coding into a future business venture by dedicating myself to continuous learning and advanced logic. I take a disciplined approach to every challenge, whether it is solving complex math problems or completing high-level university modules, always aiming to build a strong foundation for my career as a future entrepreneur. ## Skills Core Skills Mathematical Logic: Applying advanced math concepts to solve technical problems and structure code efficiently. Self-Directed Learning: Taking the initiative to complete high-level coursework, such as Harvard University modules, to master computer science fundamentals. Technical Troubleshooting: A persistent approach to debugging and refining scripts to ensure projects run smoothly. Business Mindset: Actively researching and learning the principles of how to turn technical projects into a viable business. ## Experience Experience Independent Developer & Student | Coding & Business Foundations Technical Project Design: Developed and managed independent coding projects, focusing on building functional mechanics and logical systems from scratch. Advanced Academic Growth: Balanced school priorities with high-level hobbyist interests, including deep-dives into programming languages and math-heavy logic puzzles. Entrepreneurial Preparation: Dedicated time to learning the "business side" of tech, studying how successful coding ventures are built and scaled. Strategic Problem Solving: Consistently used mathematics to optimize game scripts and improve the overall performance of digital projects.
